response:
Sec. 1
Original events unfolded in Lagos when security forces confronted young protesters.

Sec. 2
Original footage captured the tragic moment soldiers opened fire on the crowd.

Sec. 3
Original reports confirmed that many youths were shot without warning or provocation.

Sec. 4
Original investigations were delayed for years before any official findings were released.

Sec. 5
Original demands from families included justice and accountability for the lives lost.

Sec. 6
Original international outcry pressured the Nigerian government to address the Lekki shootings.

Sec. 7
Original memories of that day remain a painful scar on the nation's history.
